name: SCC_CreateSessionSetupRes_ISO
title: SCC_CreateSessionSetupRes_ISO
syntax: long SCC_CreateSessionSetupRes_ISO ( byte SessionID[], char ResponseCode[], char EVSEID[] )
description: Creates a Session Setup Response message for sending.

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 - 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
